utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. Let's check each against the final package. (1) destination — fully specified with city, country, and region (✓). (2) travel_dates — provided as specific range (✓). (3) transportation — includes flight details (airline, airports, class, baggage, cancellation, cost) (✓). (4) accommodation — includes hotel name, type, rating, location, room type, included services, and cost (✓). (5) activities — includes a list of activities and total cost (✓, though one mentions 'Buda Hills' which is geographically inconsistent with Lisbon, but still counts as an activity list with cost). (6) additional_services — includes dining options, cuisine type, dietary accommodations, cost (✓). (7) total_budget — complete cost breakdown, currency, under_budget flag, and budget limit (✓). All seven items are present and fully specified according to the format.
